last_cycle.reason: Engine timed out the worker during the post-deliverable memory-write step, but the actual work is complete and on disk. Verified: (1) index.html links style.css?v=4; (2) the .peak-body/.peak-glass/.peak-cap/.peak-light fake Puffco graphic is removed and replaced with a stylized 'Puffco Peak Pro' placeholder block; (3) puffco:card-order localStorage key is wired in the pre-paint <head> script + app.js init; (4) prefers-reduced-motion media query is in style.css; (5) ble-client.js is untouched (protocol preserved); (6) three screenshots exist (round2-light.png, round2-dark.png, round2-draw.png) and the draw screenshot shows the new '3 DRAWS THIS SESSION' chip + glowing draw ring in connected/idle state; (7) deliverable.md is comprehensive and self-reports 0 console errors. The kill was a runtime budget issue, not a code issue.

message_to_user: Round 2 polish is in. The fake Puffco blob is gone (replaced with a clean stylized 'Puffco Peak Pro' placeholder), alignment is tightened across stat/control/connection grids, motion is on the Apple cubic-bezier with transform/opacity only and prefers-reduced-motion respected, draw-sensor is wired in both idle and heating with a session counter, and cards are draggable (or use the up/down buttons) with order persisted to localStorage key 'puffco:card-order' plus a 'Reset card layout' button in the settings popover. Style cache-bust bumped to ?v=4, service worker cache bumped so the new app.js is served. Three screenshots in tools/round2-{light,dark,draw}.png.
